codeReview.summary: Reviewed the prior failed features (night-detail-view-page, recovery-view-page, trend-view-page, dashboard-routing-and-navigation) against both original and fix diffs. The fix commit resolves all four prior blocking issues: night baselines now include intraday metrics for baseline lookup, recovery now exposes a selectable 3–7 day range control wired into query params/state, trend chart timestamps use local-safe date parsing, and dashboard view/date transitions now use router.push to preserve browser history.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-worker skill mandates agent-browser verification, but this fix handoff reports followedProcedure=true without any interactiveChecks. This suggests a procedure/compliance mismatch for fix-only frontend work.
